title: Uomini e nobiluomini
writer: Emo Bistolfi, Mario Guerra, Carlo Romano
actors: Vittorio De Sica, Antonio Cifariello, Silvia Pinal
plot: Nicola Peccoli has always nurtured his niece Giovanna, an orphan since the age of two and now of age, but he does not look favorably on her beloved Mario because he is just a simple employee and a lower class of society.
